title: woodsia macrospora
intro: Woodsia macrospora, also known as the giant woodsia, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Woodsiaceae. It is native to the mountainous regions of North America and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is used to treat various health issues, including arthritis, fever, and digestive problems, and its health benefits also extend to lowering blood pressure and improving cardiovascular health. Woodsia macrospora can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
